profile.name: block-xml-rpc-and-more
profile.description: Block URI Query, URL, User Agents, and IPs (Block)

clouflare_api.filter: (http.request.uri.query contains "ical" and cf.client.bot) or (http.request.uri.query contains "eventDisplay" and cf.client.bot) or (http.request.uri.path contains "/events" and cf.client.bot) or (http.request.uri.path eq "/wp-content/uploads/wp-activity-log/non_mirrored_logs.json") or (http.request.uri.path eq "/xmlrpc.php")
clouflare_api.profile_name: Block URI Query, URL, User Agents, and IPs (Block)
